x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Integration Hub is the execution layer for AI Agent actions that interact with external systems. Without active Integration Hub spokes, AI Agents cannot perform real-world automation beyond the ServiceNow platform.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Integration Hub via sys_plugins_list.do (search: Integration Hub). Ensure the IntegrationHub Runtime and relevant spokes are active. AI Agents rely on spokes for external system actions.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c0f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Integration Hub is the execution layer for AI Agent actions that interact with external systems. Without active Integration Hub spokes, AI Agents cannot perform real-world automation beyond the ServiceNow platform.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Integration Hub Activation</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_plugins");
gr.addEncodedQuery("name LIKEIntegration Hub^active=true");
gr.query();
var n=gr.getRowCount();
return{status:n>=1?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" Integration Hub plugins active",finding:n<1?"Integration Hub is not active. AI Agents cannot perform external system automation without active Integration Hub spokes.":"Integration Hub is active -- AI Agents can leverage spokes for external automation."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>PLATFORM</module><number>CHK0000481</number><order>20</order><remediation_guidance>Activate Integration Hub via sys_plugins_list.do (search: Integration Hub). Ensure the IntegrationHub Runtime and relevant spokes are active. AI Agents rely on spokes for external system actions.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>4ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c0f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Integration Hub Activation</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_4ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c0f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
